article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 47 below-market rental units at 5860 Olive Avenue under new housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed a bylaw on June 24, 2025, requiring developer Polygon Onyx Homes Ltd. to provide 47 non-market (below-market-rate) rental units in a new 34-storey tower at 5860 Olive Avenue, with rents and tenant eligibility controlled by a legally binding agreement registered on the property title.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review how this housing agreement model may apply to your next development application.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025
